sql.if: and (a.courier_num like concat('%',#{expressName},'%') or a.kdComOrderNum like concat('%',#{expressName},'%'))
and (a.courier_num like concat('%',#{search},'%') or a.sNo like concat('%',#{search},'%'))

mapper.select:
select a.*, b.kuaidi_name, o.name, o.mobile, o.sheng, o.shi, o.xian, o.address, m.name as shop_name, m.realname as send_name, m.tel as send_tel, m.sheng as send_sheng, m.shi as send_shi, m.xian as send_xian, m.address as send_address from lkt_express_delivery a left join lkt_express b on a.express_id = b.id left join lkt_order o on a.sNo = o.sNo left join lkt_order_details d on a.order_details_id = d.id left join lkt_product_list p on d.p_id = p.id left join lkt_mch m on p.mch_id = m.id
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

select d.p_id, d.p_name, d.p_price, a.num, c.id, c.img, c.attribute from lkt_express_delivery a left join lkt_order_details d on a.order_details_id = d.id left join lkt_configure c on d.sid = c.id
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}
